title: Intricately Spiced Vietnamese Tofu Bun Cha
description: A herbal and shaggy Vietnamese dish featuring ground annatto, served in a tajine clay vessel, perfect for a solo dinner, this lacto-vegetarian friendly bun cha is a delight to the senses.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small pieces

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in the tajine clay vessel over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the ground annatto and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the firm tofu and cook until it is lightly browned on all sides.
Add the rice noodles, lime juice, and salt, and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro and serve hot.
Serve the bun cha in the tajine clay vessel, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
